data.title: Ingram Micro will use IPO proceeds to fast track digital sales
data.description: The company will use proceeds from the IPO to reduce debt and enhance AI development, further advancing digital commerce and transformation efforts.

data.title: NRF holiday forecast 2024: US ecommerce to grow twice as fast as total sales
data.description: The National Retail Federation (NRF) forecast projects online holiday sales in 2024 to grow at a rate of 8% to 9% year over year. That's more than double the forecast for total sales this holiday season.

data.title: How USG makes technical service more digital and useful to customers
data.description: With 137 restaurant equipment service locations throughout the U.S. and Canada, Unlimited Service Group launched the USG Connect mobile app to provide customers equipment performance data and an upgraded user experience.

data.title: To please customers, shippers find more ways to fulfill orders
data.description: A new study finds that high-volume small-parcel shippers are using strategies to like fulfilling from multiple distribution centers to meet customers’ delivery expectations. They’re also finding ways to cut operating costs while improving visibility into shipping status.

data.title: After a tough year, Do it Best enters deal to buy rival True Value
data.description: Under an agreement the two home improvement and hardware merchants have entered into, Do it Best would acquire all the business operations of the 4,500-store True Value chain. For Do it Best, the deal marks the largest of several recent moves to expand its multichannel business.
